title: selaginella stolleana
intro: Selaginella stolleana, also known as Stollean's spikemoss or Stollean's spike moss, is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its small, green, and spiky leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella stolleana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried extract or tea, and it can also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
